description: Substack CLI + 26-tool MCP server. Your IDE drafts replies via propose_reply. No API keys.
name: io.github.06ketan/substack-ops

environmentVariables.description: Your Substack publication URL (e.g. https://you.substack.com/). Optional if set in ~/.cursor/mcp.json's mcpServers.substack-api.env.
environmentVariables.name: SUBSTACK_PUBLICATION_URL

environmentVariables.description: Your Substack numeric user id. Optional if set in ~/.cursor/mcp.json.
environmentVariables.name: SUBSTACK_USER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Your Substack session cookie value (the s%3A... string). Required for authenticated calls. Easier path: run `substack-ops auth login --browser chrome` and the cookie is auto-grabbed.
environmentVariables.name: SUBSTACK_SESSION_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override path to the mcp.json file the auth layer reads. Defaults to ~/.cursor/mcp.json.
environmentVariables.name: SUBSTACK_OPS_MCP_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional: override the host CLI used by the unattended daemon path (default: auto-detect claude / cursor-agent / codex on PATH). Use {prompt} placeholder if your CLI takes the prompt as an arg.
environmentVariables.name: SUBSTACK_OPS_LLM_CMD

title: substack-ops
